zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Loudon於大約1081年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比時，他的父親William Lord of Kidwelly de Londres33歲，母親Matilda de Molle23歲。他於1106年與Escheyne Molle在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1131年在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比享年52歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Loudon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Louden
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Loudoun near Cunningham in Ayrshire, named in Celtic as Lugūnon ‘fort of Lugus’ (see Lyon 2).
Scottish: possibly a variant of   Lothian  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Loudon was born about 1081, in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Lord of Kidwelly de Londres, was 33 and his mother, Matilda de Molle, was 23. He married Escheyne Molle in 1106, in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1131, in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Loudon est né environ 1081, à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Lord of Kidwelly de Londres, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Molle, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Escheyne Molle en 1106, à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1131, à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1106 in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Escheyne Molle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Loudonが約1081年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーで生まれた時，父William Lord of Kidwelly de Londresは33歳，母Matilda de Molleは23歳であった。1106年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーでEscheyne Molleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1131年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーで52歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Loudon(이)가 대략 1081년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Lord of Kidwelly de Londres(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Molle(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1106년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에서 Escheyne Molle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1131년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Loudon nasceu aproximadamente 1081, em Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Lord of Kidwelly de Londres, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Molle, tinha 23 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Loudon родился около 1081 г. в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Lord of Kidwelly de Londres было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Molle, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Escheyne Molle в 1106 г. в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1131 г. в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
